title: Root drags England fight into final day against NZ | Cricket News
description: Joe Root stands between England and defeat in the second Test against New Zealand on a day when absent captain Ben Stokes makes 95 for Durham.

blocks.text: Cricket update: Root drags England fight into final day against NZ. Joe Root stands between England and defeat in the second Test against New Zealand on a day when absent captain Ben Stokes makes 95 for Durham.
